The enlarged center is intended to increase engineering and data capacity for Alkami’s platform, including anticipatory banking that responds to user behavior.
The move reflects Alkami’s focus on scaling its global talent base to support clients seeking more intelligent, data-informed banking experiences.

science.title: Unlocking Tsunami Mysteries: Key Discoveries from Space Observations
science.description: Scientists gain insights into tsunami origins and propagation through satellite observations following a major earthquake off Russia's Kamchatka Peninsula. The study, utilizing data from the SWOT satellite, highlights wave patterns near trenches, refining understanding of earthquakes and tsunamis, potentially aiding future hazard models for coastal communities.

science.title: Whale Birth Mystery Unveiled, Ancient Dog Discovered, SpaceX IPO on Horizon
science.description: Recent scientific findings reveal a collaborative birthing process among sperm whales, identify the earliest-known dog dating back 15,800 years, and report SpaceX's plans to file for an IPO potentially surpassing $75 billion. These developments bring to light intriguing details about marine biology, canine ancestry, and significant business moves.

science.title: Scientists uncovered the nutrients bees were missing - Colonies surged 15-fold
science.description: Scientists have developed a breakthrough “superfood” for honeybees by engineering yeast to produce the essential nutrients normally found in pollen. In controlled trials, colonies fed this specially designed diet produced up to 15 times more young, showing a dramatic boost in reproduction and overall health. As climate change and modern agriculture reduce the availability of natural pollen, this innovation could offer a practical way to support struggling bee populations.
